name: trib-channels
description: Discord channel plugin for Claude Code with scheduler, voice transcription, and access control

scripts.postinstall: node -e "const{execSync:e}=require('child_process'),p=require('path'),f=require('fs');const d=p.join(__dirname,'services');const v=p.join(d,'.venv');const py=process.platform==='win32'?p.join(v,'Scripts','python.exe'):p.join(v,'bin','python3');if(!f.existsSync(py)){try{e('python3 -m venv '+v,{stdio:'ignore'});e(py+' -m pip install -r '+p.join(d,'requirements.txt'),{stdio:'ignore'})}catch{}}"
